meaning: n.[希神]珀涅罗珀,Odysseus的忠实妻子,丈夫远征20年,期间她拒绝了无数求婚者
examples: Penelope came forward and embraced her sister.
The couple divorced in 1971 and he married Penelope Gollop in 1972.
She held the watch towards Penelope.
Others in literature on the list include Booker Prize-winning author Penelope Lively, 78, who is made a dame.
Also with Penelope Ann Miller, John Lone, Tim Curry, Ian McKellen, Peter Boyle, and Jonathan Winters.
